name: Hell
description:
If this is the way you have choosen you can feel the fires of Hell around
you.  As you open your mouth to gasp for air you feel the heat searing your
lungs.  You feel the burning but your flesh is in tact you feel the flames
but you see only darkness... there is no light..it is as though you are
hanging in limbo you can not touch nor feel anything around you including the
floor if there is one... you can not go forward nor can you retrace your
steps in...and you hear the anguish of other souls as they linger here...you
are alone...you are lost... all you feel is desperation.. there is no where
else you can go...you poor lost soul.......
